academicStudents.title: Student Management
academicStudents.subtitle: Clerkship student data: accounts, study programs, cohorts, and academic status.
academicStudents.emptyDesc: Add them one by one, or bulk import from an Excel/CSV file.
academicStudents.passwordCreate: Password (leave blank = generated automatically & sent via email)
academicStudents.statusEditHint: Change it by clicking the status badge in the table (reason required & recorded in audit).
academicStudents.statusCurrentInfo: {name} — current status: {status}. Inactive students are automatically rejected during rotation placement.
academicStudents.reasonPlaceholder: Example: Maternity leave for one semester per Dean's Decree No. ...
academicStudents.deleteConfirm: {name} will be removed from the student list and their login account deactivated. Students with rotation history cannot be deleted — change their status instead.
academicStudents.importInfo: Required columns: name, email, student ID (the password column is optional — if empty it is generated automatically and sent to the student's email). Download template
academicStudents.created: Student added. Login account created automatically.
academicStudents.deleted: Student deleted and their account deactivated.

academicStase.title: Rotation Management
academicStase.subtitle: Clinical rotation departments/postings along with their duration and passing grade.
academicStase.emptyDesc: Rotations are required before creating rotation schedules and exams.
academicStase.prerequisiteHint: Students can only be placed into this rotation after completing all prerequisites.
academicStase.skillDialogDesc: Skills that preceptors must observe during this rotation. Items that already have observations will be deactivated (not deleted) to preserve history.
academicStase.deleteConfirm: The rotation {name} will be deleted. Make sure no active rotation/exam is using this rotation.

academicCohorts.title: Cohort Management
academicCohorts.subtitle: Student cohort groups per study program.
academicCohorts.emptyDesc: Create a cohort first before adding students.
academicCohorts.deleteConfirm: The cohort {name} will be deleted. Cohorts that still have students cannot be deleted.

academicCalendar.title: Academic Calendar
academicCalendar.subtitle: Holidays, blackout periods, exams, and academic activities. Blackout events automatically reject overlapping rotation placements.
academicCalendar.blockRotationDesc: Placements on rotation periods overlapping these dates will be rejected by the system.
academicCalendar.deleteConfirm: The event {title} will be deleted from the calendar.
academicCalendar.deleteBlockSuffix: The rotation block over this date range will also be removed.

academicCompetencies.pageSubtitle: Manage the reference list of diseases and clinical skills for Logbook reference.
academicCompetencies.catalogDesc: List of competencies available for student logbook reference.
academicCompetencies.createDesc: Enter the details of the competency to be added to the system.
academicCompetencies.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this competency?

academicFaculty.title: Faculties & Study Programs
academicFaculty.subtitle: Management of the list of faculties and clinical study programs.
academicFaculty.deleteFacultyConfirm: The faculty {name} will be deleted. Faculties that still have study programs cannot be deleted.
academicFaculty.deleteProgramConfirm: The program {name} will be deleted. Programs that still have rotations or students cannot be deleted.
